content: SVG polar-math hit detection: On pointerdown, create SVG point: const pt = svg.createSVGPoint(); pt.x=e.clientX; pt.y=e.clientY; const svgP = pt.matrixTransform(svg.getScreenCTM().inverse()); Then polar: dx=svgP.x-200; dy=svgP.y-200; r=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy); angle=Math.atan2(dy,dx)*180/Math.PI; if(angle<0) angle+=360. r determines ring (bull<14.4, outerBull<36.5, innerSingle<186, triple<209, outerSingle<303, double<325, miss>=325). Angle maps to segment 1-20 using 18-degree sectors offset by 9 degrees (segment 20 is at top). Apply touch-action:none to SVG to prevent scroll interference. Use pointer-events:none on decorative labels.
